services.title: General Pest Control
services.text: Eliminates common household pests including cockroaches, ants, spiders, silverfish, and crawling insects with long-term protection.
services.bestFor: General disinfection against common crawling insects

services.title: Herbal Pest Control
services.text: Natural, eco-friendly formulations that minimize chemical exposure while delivering excellent results.

services.title: Cockroach Pest Control
services.text: Advanced cockroach control targeting hidden colonies with gel baiting, spray treatment, and preventive support — safe, odourless, no vacating required.

steps.title: Block the Hideouts
steps.text: Gel baiting, crack-and-crevice treatment in kitchen, drains, cabinets, and bathroom corners.

steps.title: Cut the Food Source
steps.text: Drain-zone treatment, kitchen hygiene guidance, and food-source reduction.

steps.title: Destroy the Colony
steps.text: Gel baiting and targeted spray for visible cockroaches and hidden colonies.

steps.title: Monitor and Protect
steps.text: Scheduled follow-ups, service tracking, and warranty-backed AMC support.

services.title: Termite Pest Control
services.text: Advanced anti-termite treatments for homes, offices, shops, warehouses, and industrial facilities.

services.title: Bed Bug Pest Control
services.text: Complete elimination of adult bed bugs and eggs for healthier, peaceful sleep.

services.title: Mosquito Pest Control
services.text: Indoor and outdoor mosquito management to protect families from mosquito-borne diseases.

services.title: Rodent Pest Control
services.text: Inspection, trapping, exclusion, and preventive solutions to keep your property rodent-free.

services.title: Ant Control
services.text: Colony-focused treatment that eliminates infestations at the source.

services.title: Tick Pest Control
services.text: Specialized treatment for homes with pets, gardens, and family spaces.
